name: rpn
creator: mobluse
description: RPN calculator based on https://my.numworks.com/python/garycmartin/rpn . Use ? to show words. It allows comma to be used as an alternative to space. It also allows words to be followed by parenthesis: e.g. “pi,cos()” is -1. Some words were changed to words that are easier to enter using the Numworks keyboard.
